allow: PowerShell($paths = @\("$env:ProgramFiles\\Git\\cmd\\git.exe", "${env:ProgramFiles\(x86\)}\\Git\\cmd\\git.exe", "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Programs\\Git\\cmd\\git.exe"\); $found = $paths | Where-Object { Test-Path $_ }; if \($found\) { Write-Output "FOUND: $found"; & $found[0] --version } else { Write-Output "NOT INSTALLED"; winget --version })
PowerShell($git = "$env:ProgramFiles\\Git\\cmd\\git.exe"; & $git ls-files | Select-String -Pattern '\(^|/\)\\.env$|\\.db$' -AllMatches; Write-Output "--- check done \(empty above = good\) ---")
PowerShell(npx tsc --noEmit; "tsc exit: $LASTEXITCODE"; npx eslint src/components/hearth-marquee.tsx src/app/page.tsx; "eslint exit: $LASTEXITCODE"2)
PowerShell(npx prisma migrate status; "migrate status exit: $LASTEXITCODE")

PowerShell(foreach \($port in 3000,3124,3211\) { try { $procId = \(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort $port -State Listen -ErrorAction Stop\).OwningProcess | Select-Object -Unique; foreach \($pid2 in $procId\) { Stop-Process -Id $pid2 -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; "killed PID $pid2 on $port" } } catch { "nothing on $port" } })
PowerShell(npx tsc --noEmit; "tsc: $LASTEXITCODE"; npx eslint src/app/actions/profile.ts src/app/actions/planner.ts "src/app/api/auth/logout/route.ts"; "eslint: $LASTEXITCODE")

PowerShell(foreach \($port in 3000,3211,3212\) { try { $procId = \(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort $port -State Listen -ErrorAction Stop\).OwningProcess | Select-Object -Unique; foreach \($p in $procId\) { Stop-Process -Id $p -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue } } catch {} }; "ports cleared")

PowerShell(npx tsc --noEmit; "tsc: $LASTEXITCODE"; "--- key present? ---"; if \(Select-String -Path ".env" -Pattern "SPOONACULAR_API_KEY" -Quiet\) { "SPOONACULAR_API_KEY found in .env" } else { "SPOONACULAR_API_KEY NOT set" })
PowerShell(npx prisma migrate dev --name add_recipe_source_cache; "migrate exit: $LASTEXITCODE")
PowerShell(npx prisma migrate deploy; "deploy exit: $LASTEXITCODE"; "--- regenerate client ---"; npx prisma generate 2>&1 | Select-Object -Last 3)

PowerShell(npx tsx -e "import\('@/lib/types'\).then\(m => console.log\('alias OK, exports:', Object.keys\(m\).length\)\).catch\(e => console.log\('alias FAILED:', e.message.split\([char]10\)[0]\)\)" 2>&1 | Select-Object -Last 3)
